---
name: UI Improvement
about: Visual design, animation, or theme enhancement
title: "ui: "
labels: ui
assignees: ""
---

## What to improve

Describe the current visual state and what should change.

## Which screen or component

- Screen: (Home / Threats / Swarm / Replay / Modes)
- Component:
- Theme affected: (All / Nebula / Terminal / Solaris / Glassmorph / Lumina)

## Reference or mockup

Attach a sketch, screenshot, or design reference if available.

## Design rationale

Why does this improve the OMNYX visual language? How does it align with the project's aesthetic philosophy (cinematic, atmospheric, operational)?

## Animation considerations

Does this change affect animations? Describe expected motion behavior.
